title: Notification Event Message Schema
description: JSON schema for validating notification event messages sent via RabbitMQ

recipientUserIds.description: List of user IDs who should receive this notification

actorUserIds.description: List of user IDs who performed the action (actors)

actorUsernames.description: List of usernames of the actors. Optional if actorUserIds are provided

actionType.description: Type of action that triggered the notification

objectType.description: Type of object the action was performed on

objectId.description: ID of the object the action was performed on

objectTitle.description: Title or name of the object the action was performed on

occurredAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the action occurred. If not provided, will be set to current time

metadata.description: Optional metadata for future extensibility. Can contain additional context about the notification
